package com.consumer.x;

// Tier-2 reporter-declaration target. Sibling fixtures name it in a first-line
// reporters directive (this file, InternalLog.logInternal); javalint parses it
// only for its package (com.consumer.x), so a call site is matched on
// (package, Class, method). It carries no catch, so it reports nothing itself.
public class InternalLog {
    public static void logInternal(String msg, Throwable cause) {}
}
